steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia dividend withholding from 13.5% to treaty rate of 15.0%
Submit refund application to Finnish Tax Administration using Form 6163e/6167e for the EUR 3,607.50 overcollection
Reference FI-NO tax treaty Article 10 limiting dividend withholding to 15% for portfolio investments
Follow up with custodian within 30 days if no correction is processed

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
Vero – Payments of Dividends to Nonresidents
